reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark deterministic review clustering and curation-flow guardrails satisfied; do not infer that every false positive or false negative has been resolved.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names deterministic grouping hints and bounded review input packet behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by review-input runtime tests showing bounded clusters, skipped cluster records, current labels, audience/semantic grouping, and action-bucket focus.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep review-input clustering and action-bucket tests current when changing deterministic grouping hints.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names Cautilus Agent curation guardrails before review or eval continuation.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by curation-flow audit tests requiring extraction, dedupe, false-positive, false-negative, bucket curation, and stop-boundary signals, and failing when the flow skips curation or overruns into review/eval work.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep curation-flow audits aligned with any changes to false-positive, false-negative, review-priority, or stop-boundary policy.
